raw: {"name":"helixllm-coder-a2a","description":"HelixLLM CPU/GPU coder fleet exposed as a Google A2A (Agent2Agent) peer — accepts a code-generation Task and returns a completed Task whose Artifact carries the real model output.","version":"0.1.0","url":"http://localhost:18441","capabilities":{"streaming":false,"pushNotifications":false,"extendedAgentCard":false},"defaultInputModes":["text/plain"],"defaultOutputModes":["text/plain"],"skills":[{"id":"generate-code","name":"Generate code","description":"Accepts a natural-language coding request and returns generated source via the live model \"/models/Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf\".","tags":["code-generation","coder"],"examples":["Write a Go function that returns the nth Fibonacci number."]}],"securitySchemes":{"bearer":{"type":"http","scheme":"bearer"}},"security":[{"bearer":[]}],"preferredTransport":"JSONRPC"}
